missing_patrol.last_answer: The Tavern Runner glances at the coin and nods, leaning in closer. "Listen, if you're looking into the patrol, you might want to check out the old milestone to the east. Last I heard, something strange happened there. Just be careful; folks are talking about shadows lurking in those parts. It’s not just bandits you need to watch for."
missing_patrol.last_player_input: "Do you know their name? What do they stand to gain from such an attack?" Galinor sups from his bowl, still whispering.

topic:else.last_answer: The Tavern Runner leans in closer, lowering their voice even further. "If you're truly curious about that missing patrol, there’s talk of a figure named Lord Aldric. They say he's been asking around about it as well. Might be worth your time to seek him out. Just be careful; not everyone's on friendly terms with him."
